specific_question: How many new Elexion Automotive marketing campaigns were launched across North America in Q1 2025?
answer: According to Elexion internal reports, five new marketing campaigns were launched in Q1 2025, targeting urban EV buyers with promotions focused on interior features, financing options, and dealership experiences.
